0.response: {"Q0":"When the astronaut left the red planet, I tried not to dig on the planet so that I could save up some of my gold for when I have to dig the blue planet. I also tried as much as possible to select most the galaxy that has higher percentage of winning higher amount of money."}

7.response: {"Q0":"The higher the percentage to gain a high amount on a galaxy, the more I chose that galaxy."}

5.response: {"Q0":"Yes I kept digging but stopped at some point because the gems stopped getting sold and I kept losing gold the more I kept digging, so, I had to save the gold  to dig the planet that had gems that I could sell."}

6.response: {"Q0":"Yes I did, this is because I could not really avoid getting it."}

8.response: {"Q0":"Yes I focused more on selecting galaxies because the time provided for it was so small and it pops up immediately after visiting planets and this makes it hard to make a selection so fast before it disappears."}
